spanGrp.span: A: First thing first, tell us your name
U: my name is Imm ʕAbdalla al-ʕarǧān
A: complete, U: from the Bani Ṣaxar tribe, the Xaḏ̣īr of Bani Ṣaxar
A: complete, U: from the Bani Ṣaxar tribe, the Xaḏ̣īr of Bani Ṣaxar
A: your full name, U:my name is Enʕām al-Xaḏ̣īr
A: your full name, U:my name is Enʕām al-Xaḏ̣īr
A: Enʕām how? U:Enʕām (ma)ḥmūd al-Xaḏ̣īr, A: yes, (ma)ḥmūd al-Xaḏ̣īr
A: Enʕām how? U:Enʕām (ma)ḥmūd al-Xaḏ̣īr, A: yes, (ma)ḥmūd al-Xaḏ̣īr
A: yes, U: from the bani ṣaxar tribe, from the xaḏ̣īr of the bani ṣaxar, A: from the xaḏ̣īr of the bani ṣaxar, how old are you?
A: yes, U: from the bani ṣaxar tribe, from the xaḏ̣īr of the bani ṣaxar, A: from the xaḏ̣īr of the bani ṣaxar, how old are you?
U: I live in al-ma(w)gar luwā (add accent), luwā (add accent) al-Ma(w)gar ruǧm aš-šāmi, the village of ruǧm aš-šāmi al-ġarbi
A: and have you always lived in the same place? U: yes, since I was born, and God willing I (will) die in Ruǧm aš-šāmi
A: and have you always lived in the same place? U: yes, since I was born, and God willing I (will) die in Ruǧm aš-šāmi
A: where did you study? U: I studied in the high school of ruǧm aš-šāmi, at the beginning (?) it was mixed
A: where did you study? U: I studied in the high school of ruǧm aš-šāmi, at the beginning (?) it was mixed
U: from class one/first (?), second class, third, until 4th class, then no, in 4th class, no after it finished, it started (?) middle school, and then high school
U: from class one/first (?), second class, third, until 4th class, then no, in 4th class, no after it finished, it started (?) middle school, and then high school
Mother: and of course it was girls school... the boys alone and the girls alone / separated
Mother: and of course it was girls school... the boys alone and the girls alone / separated
A: did you go to the university or not? U: no, I swear to God I did not.
A: did you go to the university or not? U: no, I swear to God I did not.
A: where is your husband from? U: my husband is also from the Xaḏ̣īr, from my relatives (people)
A: where is your husband from? U: my husband is also from the Xaḏ̣īr, from my relatives (people)
A: do you go to Amman? you go sometimes? U: yes we go sometimes, [نطش(الخروج من المنزل) ] we go out buying stuff from Amman, going shopping
A: do you go to Amman? you go sometimes? U: yes we go sometimes, [نطش(الخروج من المنزل) ] we go out buying stuff from Amman, going shopping

U: yes, we don't always go to Amman A: ah, not always U: not always A: when it is needed (lit. in time of need) or we go there when we want to a change of scene (lit. change the air), going out, buying things

U: yes, we don't always go to Amman A: ah, not always U: not always A: when it is needed (lit. in time of need) or we go there when we want to a change of scene (lit. change the air), going out, buying things
U: but we don't always go to Amman (richiamo del soggetto- sogg a sin con poi pronome che richiama) A: ok. let's talk about the engagement and the wedding of the Bani Ṣaxar
U: but we don't always go to Amman (richiamo del soggetto- sogg a sin con poi pronome che richiama) A: ok. let's talk about the engagement and the wedding of the Bani Ṣaxar
U:Of the Bani Ṣaxar or mine? A: I mean, the one you want, you are a Ṣxariyya, I mean [let’s] talk about the engagement…U: fine, for the Bani Ṣaxar the first thing is…
U:Of the Bani Ṣaxar or mine? A: I mean, the one you want, you are a Ṣxariyya, I mean [let’s] talk about the engagement…U: fine, for the Bani Ṣaxar the first thing is…
A: which are the traditions? U: [for] the Bani Ṣaxar …
A: which are the traditions? U: [for] the Bani Ṣaxar …
U: [for] the Bani Ṣaxar …the tradition is followed by almost all of us
U: [for] the Bani Ṣaxar …the tradition is followed by almost all of us
U: it is to say most of the people are engaged with a one of their relatives, usually the girl does not go away [from the family]
U: it is to say most of the people are engaged with a one of their relatives, usually the girl does not go away [from the family]
U: and the very most part take the cousin, but if he is not available sometimes she goes away… the important thing is that we are almost all [with] a cousin
U: and the very most part take the cousin, but if he is not available sometimes she goes away… the important thing is that we are almost all [with] a cousin
U: the closer with the closer and the nearer with the nearer
U: the closer with the closer and the nearer with the nearer
U: But thanks God I took one which was not my relative, not my proper cousin, only from the same branch of the tribe A:[a] Xaḏ̣īr
U: But thanks God I took one which was not my relative, not my proper cousin, only from the same branch of the tribe A:[a] Xaḏ̣īr
U: [before] the people tell him about her, his brothers, and other people
U: [before] the people tell him about her, his brothers, and other people
U: as first thing they sent a small ǧāha (group), his father, his mother,
U: as first thing they sent a small ǧāha (group), his father, his mother,
U: his uncle, I mean from members of his family, they go see the girl
U: his uncle, I mean from members of his family, they go see the girl

A: ok.. U: they talk to her father, of course her father asks her opinion, thanks God for us the opinion is compulsory for the girl, they have to ask the girl, only few times there are few families who do not ask her opinion, but for the most part they do

A: ok.. U: they talk to her father, of course her father asks her opinion, thanks God for us the opinion is compulsory for the girl, they have to ask the girl, only few times there are few families who do not ask her opinion, but for the most part they do
U: yes, if the girl agrees, they make the engagement and bring a bigger group of representatives [of the groom’s family] and decide the dowry
U: yes, if the girl agrees, they make the engagement and bring a bigger group of representatives [of the groom’s family] and decide the dowry
A: how much is the dowery? U: usually between close relatives the dowry is not that high…
A: how much is the dowery? U: usually between close relatives the dowry is not that high…
A: oh so between the relatives it is not high, U: yeah, between relatives they are always sympathetic/they take care of each other A: so the dowry is the bride’s share
A: oh so between the relatives it is not high, U: yeah, between relatives they are always sympathetic/they take care of each other A: so the dowry is the bride’s share
U: I mean the dowry of my turn/ period when I got married, around the 94
U: I mean the dowry of my turn/ period when I got married, around the 94
U: and he gave us a house, he gave his house, and the most part live (?) with (within) the family, at his father, and his mother and his parents
U: and he gave us a house, he gave his house, and the most part live (?) with (within) the family, at his father, and his mother and his parents
U: yabnūn byūt šaʕr...A: min as-sabt la-l-ǧumaʕ, sabʕat tiyyām. U: ā, sabʕat tiyyām
U: yabnūn byūt šaʕr...A: min as-sabt la-l-ǧumaʕ, sabʕat tiyyām. U: ā, sabʕat tiyyām
U: yaʕni nādiran alli mā ysawwi sabʕat tiyyām ʔilla...
U: yaʕni nādiran alli mā ysawwi sabʕat tiyyām ʔilla...
U: they do the ḥēnna, the ḥēnna of the bride, her female relatives and friends
U: they do the ḥēnna, the ḥēnna of the bride, her female relatives and friends
U: to the house of the groom
U: to the house of the groom
U: they make a big meal, it means the father slaughters for him 10 - 11 pieces of livestock
U: they make a big meal, it means the father slaughters for him 10 - 11 pieces of livestock
A: it means they invite all their relatives, U: yes,
A: it means they invite all their relatives, U: yes,
U: gabel,gabel lāʔ, min ʕa-dōṛ al...gabel as-sabaʕīn
U: gabel,gabel lāʔ, min ʕa-dōṛ al...gabel as-sabaʕīn
U: u gabel haḏa lāʔ, mā kā​n fi krūt daʕwa w la fi iši
U: u gabel haḏa lāʔ, mā kā​n fi krūt daʕwa w la fi iši
A: la kān fi iši? U:la A: ṭayyib
A: la kān fi iši? U:la A: ṭayyib
A: šu fi... yaʕni inti hassā b-xuṭbat-ič yaʕni sōlifī-l-na ʕann-ek intim U: ana? A: ā, xuṭbat-ič, enti, šufti abū-y, gaʕdti maʕu gabel al-xuṭba
A: šu fi... yaʕni inti hassā b-xuṭbat-ič yaʕni sōlifī-l-na ʕann-ek intim U: ana? A: ā, xuṭbat-ič, enti, šufti abū-y, gaʕdti maʕu gabel al-xuṭba
U: lāʔ, ḥanna ʕala ṭul 14 yōm w tiǧawwazna yaʕni
U: lāʔ, ḥanna ʕala ṭul 14 yōm w tiǧawwazna yaʕni
